$description: Dark sci-fi dashboard design system. Source of truth: public/css/tokens.css

color.$description: 10 neon accents on a near-black background. Each accent has a matching glow shadow.

background.$description: Page background. Near-black with a slight blue tint. All surfaces float above this.

text.$description: Primary text color. Off-white for comfortable reading on dark backgrounds.

text-muted.$description: Secondary text for timestamps, labels, and de-emphasized content.

neon-pink.$description: Primary accent. Used for Body column widgets, left panel border glow, and the main visual identity. High energy, attention-grabbing.

neon-blue.$description: Secondary accent. Used for hydration water, bio terminal prompts, clock display, and informational elements.

neon-green.$description: Success and active states. Used for Mind column widgets, live-dot indicators, GitHub contribution heatmap, and operational status.

neon-amber.$description: Warning and warmth. Used for heart rate display, bookshelf accent, reading feed, coffee hydration, and in-progress states.

neon-purple.$description: Sleep and rest. Used for night summary widget, sleep score gradients, and calm/recovery contexts.

neon-red.$description: Alert and activity. Used for daily activity column headers, elevated heart rate zones, and error states.

neon-cyan.$description: Information and data streams. Cool, technical feel. Available for system output and data visualization.

neon-orange.$description: Urgency and degraded state. Warmer than amber, used sparingly for escalated warnings.

neon-indigo.$description: Identity and premium. Used for the avatar glow ring, name text-shadow, identity card interactions, and neon-pill hover state.

neon-yellow.$description: Theatre reviews accent. Defined in component scope (not in tokens.css). Bright gold for cultural/entertainment content.

high-contrast.$description: AAA-compliant variants (>=7:1 contrast against #06060f) for small text and prefers-contrast:more contexts.

glass.$description: Glass-morphism surface system. Three elevation levels with semi-transparent white backgrounds and backdrop blur.

bg-inset.$description: Recessed surface. For nested backgrounds, inset panels, and sub-card elements.

bg.$description: Default card surface. The standard glass-morphism background for all widget cards.

bg-raised.$description: Elevated surface. For hover states, modals, and elements that need to appear above default cards.

border.$description: Default glass border. Subtle edge definition for cards and panels.

border-strong.$description: Emphasized glass border. For hover states and elements needing stronger visual separation.

blur.$description: Backdrop blur scale for glass-morphism depth.

sm.$description: Light blur. For overlays and modal backdrops.

lg.$description: Heavy blur. Default for widget cards and identity card.

xl.$description: Maximum blur. For book modal and high-priority overlays.

typography.$description: Space Grotesk variable font (300-700 weight). All sizes use fluid clamp() scaling between 600px and 1400px viewports.

font-family.$description: Primary font stack. Fallback is metric-matched Arial (size-adjust: 106%) to minimize layout shift.

font-mono.$description: Monospace stack. Same font but with monospace fallback for terminal and data displays.

size-xs.$description: Extra small. Heatmap cell labels, fine print, status badges.

size-sm.$description: Small. Timestamps, secondary labels, widget metadata.

size-base.$description: Base body text. Widget content, terminal output, list items.

size-md.$description: Medium. Widget header labels, emphasized body text. Same scale as base.

size-lg.$description: Large. Section headers, bio text, modal descriptions.

size-xl.$description: Extra large. BPM numbers, stat counts, hydration values.

size-2xl.$description: Double extra large. Hero numbers, sleep duration, city names.

size-3xl.$description: Triple extra large. BPM display at full size.

size-hero.$description: Hero text. The identity card name with indigo glow text-shadow.

spacing.$description: 16-step fluid spacing scale. All use clamp() with rem+vw preferred values scaling 600px-1400px.

space-2.$description: Micro spacing. Tight gaps between inline elements.

space-4.$description: Tight spacing. Icon gaps, small margins.

space-6.$description: Small gap. Terminal dots, compact lists.

space-8.$description: Base gap. List item padding, small card gaps.

space-10.$description: Standard gap. Widget body vertical padding, link gaps.

space-12.$description: Card gap. Triptych grid gap, widget header padding.

space-14.$description: Medium gap. Terminal body padding, status panel padding.

space-16.$description: Standard padding. Widget sub-card padding, workout stats.

space-18.$description: Widget body horizontal padding. The main content inset.

space-20.$description: Panel padding. Right panel content inset, status panel padding.

space-24.$description: Large padding. Neon pill horizontal padding, modal insets.

space-32.$description: Section spacing. Left panel horizontal padding.

space-36.$description: Large section gap. Left panel side padding.

space-48.$description: Maximum spacing. Left panel top padding.

radius.$description: Border radius scale. Small values are fixed; large values use fluid clamp().

sm.$description: Tight radius. Heatmap cells, skeleton bars.

md.$description: Standard radius. Inner cards, terminals, modals at mobile.

lg.$description: Large radius. Status panels, workout sub-cards.

xl.$description: Extra large radius. Widget cards (.tri-card), identity card.

pill.$description: Pill shape. Neon pill buttons, tags, status badges.

circle.$description: Perfect circle. Avatar, live-dot, modal close button.

glow.$description: Two-layer neon glow box-shadows. Each accent has a desktop (2-layer) and mobile (1-layer) variant.

pink.$description: Pink glow. Card hover, focus states for Body column.

blue.$description: Blue glow. Hydration, terminal, and informational hover.

green.$description: Green glow. Mind column hover, success highlights.

amber.$description: Amber glow. Heart rate, bookshelf, reading hover.

red.$description: Red glow. Alert states, elevated heart rate.

indigo.$description: Indigo glow. Identity card, avatar ring, premium elements.

left-width.$description: Left panel width. Fixed identity column.

right-width.$description: Right panel width. Scrollable content area.

top-bar-height.$description: Command bar height. Fixed at top of right panel.

max-site-width.$description: Ultra-wide cap. Layout centers beyond this width.
